{{Quote|The sooner I get out of here, the less I'll have to try to say the name.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Death Troopers">''[[Death Troopers]]''</ref>}}
'''Gal'fian'deprisi''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Galantos]]. As the city was half-sunk into the [[Gar'glum Sea]], there were no landing pads for [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. The city was accessible only by [[Vert'bo airship]]s from the [[Chirk'pn Wastes]].

{{City-stub}}
